results.finalAnswer:
ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - language parsing and graph extraction pipeline
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio - MCP stdio server/query surface and request handling
SUBSYSTEM: aify-project-graph - core project-graph domain layer for the repo’s main capability

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - language-aware extraction and indexing pipeline; the map calls it out as a primary subsystem
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio - MCP stdio runtime surface; it contains the server, query flow, storage, and freshness orchestration
SUBSYSTEM: aify-project-graph - repo-level core/product subsystem explicitly listed in the project map

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - graph-building pipeline; language extractors, resolver, sweep, and fingerprinting populate the code graph
SUBSYSTEM: . - repo-level aify-project-graph package surface; package metadata, install docs, scripts, and integrations define how it is shipped and used
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio - MCP stdio runtime surface; it hosts the server, query layer, storage, freshness, and analysis flow

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness/ - owns query-time freshness, manifest/git checks, locking, and rebuild vs incremental indexing decisions
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest/ - parses the repo into graph facts via filesystem sweep, language extractors, framework plugins, and cross-file resolution
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/ - implements the MCP `graph_*` verbs plus ranking/rendering, so this is where user-visible query behavior lives

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP verb layer; `server.js` imports these handlers to expose `graph_*` tools and render their outputs.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - extraction pipeline; walkers, language configs, extractors, framework plugins, and the resolver turn repo files into graph nodes and edges.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/storage - persistence layer; SQLite schema plus node/edge CRUD back the `.aify-graph/graph.sqlite` graph database.

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP verb layer; defines `graph_*` tools and turns the graph into report/path/impact/file outputs.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - indexing pipeline; walks the repo, parses languages with tree-sitter, and emits/resolves graph nodes and edges.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/storage - SQLite persistence layer; owns schema plus node/edge CRUD for `.aify-graph/graph.sqlite`.
